message:
fix: use UTC for wisp timestamp comparisons (gt-ty4)

Dolt stores timestamps in UTC. Several checks compared these UTC
timestamps against local time, causing false "future timestamp" alarms
every evening PDT when UTC was already the next day.

- patrol_check: use time.Now().UTC() for stuck-wisp cutoff, label
  output timestamps as UTC
- wisp_check: use time.Now().UTC() for abandoned-wisp cutoff
- patrol.go: use UTC dates for digest date comparisons
- mq_status: use UTC for "in the future" detection
